ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: in Monimentis veterum noviter observatae: Elegiacum poema: Sanctissimo Principi Urbano VIII Pont. Opt. Max. Sacrum: Auctore Iusto Riquio Lynceo C. R.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, si videbitur Reverendiss. P. Mag. Sacri Palatii Apost. A. Episc. Hierac. Vicesg. Imprimatur. Fr. Antoninus Phoebaeus Magister, & Socius Reverendissimi Patris Nicolai Rodulfi Ordin. Praedic. Sacri Palatii Apostolici Magistri.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
